PostToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(c|h)$'; then echo '[hook] C file modified — remember to verify against Ghidra'; fi

SessionStart.command: echo '=== CrystalOSD Session ===' && echo "Files in src/: $(find src/ -name '*.c' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') source files" && echo "Files in asm/: $(find asm/ -name '*.s' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') asm files" && echo '========================'
